ab: izaw ku cacay a kaput aku ci Palihu, hina makatawal ciniza tu cacanan.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Palihu，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Palihu, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: yu a micudad tu sa, micaliw tu ciniza tu sapisulit, sasipu, atu sasulitan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: kinacacay, kinatusa, kinatulu, pacaliwen henay nu katuuday ciniza tu cacanan.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: nika laecus ku mahiniay a wayway niza, hina caliw tu cacanan caay pacubelis.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: sazikuzay caay tu pacaliwen nu katuuday tu cacanan i cinizaan.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: u cacay a demiad, maladay amin kami tahekal midang.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: teban nu zazan, akenih ci Palihu a mutayi’, makatawal muala tu sapisingat ciniza.
ch: 路途中，Palihu想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Palihu wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: a micaliw ciniza i kaput tu sapisingat, nika patubelien amin nu kaput inayay ku niala aku sa.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: akenih tu ci Palihu muangic tu. mabalucu’ ciniza sakamusa, kya caay amin kamu pacaliw tu sapisingat i takuwan!!
ch: Palihu急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!
en: Palihu burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: sakamu han tu nu kaput, zayhan caay pikelid kisu tu cacanan numisu, saaca nipacaliwan niyam tisuan a cacanan, caay aca kisu pacubelis!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: tucila micudad, matabal ci Palihu katukuh tu i cacudadan, pacubelisen amin ni Palihu ku nicaliwan tu cacanan i kaput.
ch: 隔天上學，Palihu很早就到學校了，Palihu把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Palihu arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: papisulul ci Palihu tu kaput, sakamu sa anuayaw aku tu ku mukeliday tu cacanan, kukay tu kaput nuayawan pacaliw kamu i takuwan tu cacanan.
ch: Palihu向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Palihu apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
